title: salvia clandestina var. obtusata
intro: Salvia clandestina var. obtusata is a lesser-known variety of the Salvia genus, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as sage. This plant is used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Salvia clandestina var. obtusata include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve cognitive function, and support immune system health. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or teas, and it can also be used in the form of tinctures or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
